name: tkn-codex-context-engineering
description: Register Codex projects, preserve project context, review local chat logs, and manage session notes, decisions, memos, global context, freshness, and distillation across chats and repositories.

interface.shortDescription: Register projects, maintain context, review Codex chats, and reuse private notes
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that groups context engineering skills and scripts for Codex project registration, legacy local-context migration, working context dashboards, session notes and resume, decision records and review, project memos, local Codex chat review, session-log extraction, distillation candidates and finalization, freshness audits, read-only global context loading, explicit snapshot import, and promotion through ~/.codex-context.
defaultPrompt: Register this repository in the global Codex context registry
Resume an existing project session note
